title: Public Glass, San Francisco, CA - Reviews, Ratings, Tips and Why You Should Go – Wanderlog
content: Visitors rave about the knowledgeable and fun instructors like Ray and Mike, who make classes enjoyable and engaging . The studio offers a wide range of classes from hot shop to cold working, catering to all skill levels.

title: Public Glass, San Francisco, CA - Reviews (23), Photos (28) - BestProsInTown
content: June 28, 2024 - This place is a hidden gem! It’s a glass studio and school - one of the few public access spots and the only one in San Francisco. They have a cool gift shop with glass crafts, a wide selection of classes, and the staff are all super friendly.

title: PUBLIC GLASS - Updated June 2026 - 73 Photos & 43 Reviews - 1750 Armstrong Ave, San Francisco, California - +14156714916 - Art Schools - Yelp
content: January 27, 2026 - “I signed up for the hot 100 class, intro to glassblowing, and it was by far one of the coolest things I've ever done .” in 6 reviews

title: Public Glass, 1750 Armstrong Ave, San Francisco, CA - Groupon
content: Such a cool place! Everyone there is super friendly and helpful . Rented torch time there and had so much fun! Can’t wait to attend Hot Glass/Cold Beer!
